reforms.description: Germany improved the framework conditions for innovation by ensuring sufficient exit possibilities for venture capitalists and enhancing transparency through unified supervision of venture capital and capital investment companies. An investment grant for Business Angels was introduced in May 2013.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The reform enhances the investment environment for venture capital, which is crucial for fostering innovation and entrepreneurship.
reforms.status_evidence: The investment grant for Business Angels was introduced and is currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform significantly improves the conditions for venture capital investment, which is important for innovation but does not constitute a major overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: In May 2013, Germany introduced an investment grant for Business Angels (Investitionszuschuss Wagniskapital).

reforms.description: The new governing parties have committed to a comprehensive reform of the Renewable Energy Sources Act (EEG) to make the support scheme for renewable energy sources more cost-effective and to integrate renewable energies into the market in the long run.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The reform aims to enhance the efficiency and market integration of renewable energy, which is essential for sustainable economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The commitment to reform has been made by the new governing parties but has not yet been implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant overhaul of the existing support scheme for renewable energy, impacting the entire sector.
reforms.source_quote: The new governing parties have announced their intention of comprehensive reform of the RES Act (Erneuerbare Energien Gesetz, EEG).
